---

## What needs to change

**Object:** (Lead, Account, Contact, Campaign, etc.)
**Type:** Data update / New field / New automation / Fix

## Details

**Description:** (what specifically needs to happen)
**Filter/Scope:** (which records are affected)
**Estimated Records:**

## If Data Update
- [ ] Backup taken / reversible
- [ ] Converted leads excluded
- [ ] Opted-out leads excluded
- [ ] Activity logged

## If New Field/Automation
- [ ] Field created with FLS granted
- [ ] Added to relevant page layouts
- [ ] Added to list views
- [ ] Test class written (75%+ coverage)
- [ ] Deployed to production
